Client.title: Client
Client.description: Represents a client for whom budgets are created.

contactEmail.description: Email address of the client for contact purposes.

contactPhone.description: Phone number of the client for contact purposes.

notes.description: Any additional notes or information about the client.

userId.description: The ID of the user who owns this client.

Payment.title: Payment
Payment.description: Represents a single payment made towards a budget.

date.description: The date the payment was made.

notes.description: Any notes related to the payment.

PaintingRoom.title: Painting Room
PaintingRoom.description: Details of a room for painting services.

deductionsArea.description: Area to be deducted (doors, windows, etc.)

ElectricalItem.title: Electrical Item
ElectricalItem.description: Represents a single item in an electrical budget.

value.description: Unit cost of the electrical item.

ElectricalServiceItem.title: Electrical Service Item
ElectricalServiceItem.description: Represents a predefined item for electrical services with a default value.

name.description: Description of the electrical service item (e.g., 'Instalação de tomada dupla').

defaultValue.description: The default price for this service item.

userId.description: The ID of the user who owns this service item.

HydraulicItem.title: Hydraulic Item
HydraulicItem.description: Represents a single item in a hydraulic budget.

value.description: Unit cost of the hydraulic item.

HydraulicServiceItem.title: Hydraulic Service Item
HydraulicServiceItem.description: Represents a predefined item for hydraulic services with a default value.

name.description: Description of the hydraulic service item (e.g., 'Instalação de ponto de água').

defaultValue.description: The default price for this service item.

userId.description: The ID of the user who owns this service item.

PaintingServiceItem.title: Painting Service Item
PaintingServiceItem.description: Represents a predefined item for painting services with a default value per m2.

name.description: Description of the painting service item (e.g., 'Pintura com Massa Corrida').

defaultValue.description: The default price per m2 for this service item.

userId.description: The ID of the user who owns this service item.

ServiceTypeItem.title: Service Type Item
ServiceTypeItem.description: Represents a custom service type defined by the user.

userId.description: The ID of the user who owns this service type.

Budget.title: Budget
Budget.description: Represents a budget created for a client.

clientName.description: Name of the client for the budget.

serviceType.description: The type of service for the budget.

task.description: Description of the task to be performed.

registrationDate.description: The date the budget was registered.

materialCost.description: Cost of materials for the project.

profit.description: Calculated profit for the project (total - materialCost).

status.description: Status of the budget (e.g., prospecção, ativo, concluído, cancelado).

userId.description: The ID of the user who owns this budget.

paymentHistory.description: A history of payments made for this budget.

wallWidth.description: Width of the wall in meters, for painting services.

wallHeight.description: Height of the wall in meters, for painting services.

sqMetersPrice.description: Price per square meter, for painting services.

paintCoats.description: Number of paint coats required, for painting services.

electricalItems.description: A list of items for an electrical budget.

hydraulicItems.description: A list of items for a hydraulic budget.

issueInvoice.description: Indicates if an invoice will be issued for this budget.

invoiceTaxRate.description: The tax rate percentage to be applied for the invoice.

DailyRate.title: DailyRate
DailyRate.description: Represents the configuration for a daily rate.

id.description: Unique identifier for the daily rate configuration.

startTime.description: Start time of the daily work period.

endTime.description: End time of the daily work period.

totalHours.description: Total working hours per day, including breaks.

dailyValue.description: Monetary value of the daily rate.

description.description: Short description of the daily rate configuration.

CompanyProfile.title: Company Profile
CompanyProfile.description: Represents the user's company information for invoices and reports.

companyTaxId.description: Tax ID of the company (e.g., CNPJ).

userId.description: The ID of the user who owns this company profile.

/users/{userId}.description: Stores public information about a user.

/users/{userId}/clients/{clientId}.description: Sub-collection for clients owned by a specific user.

/users/{userId}/budgets/{budgetId}.description: Sub-collection for budgets owned by a specific user.

/users/{userId}/dailyRates/{dailyRateId}.description: Sub-collection for daily rates owned by a specific user.

/users/{userId}/companyProfile/{profileI.description: Sub-collection for the company profile owned by a specific user.

/users/{userId}/electricalServiceItems/{.description: Sub-collection for predefined electrical service items for a specific user.

/users/{userId}/hydraulicServiceItems/{i.description: Sub-collection for predefined hydraulic service items for a specific user.

/users/{userId}/paintingServiceItems/{it.description: Sub-collection for predefined painting service items for a specific user.

/users/{userId}/serviceTypes/{serviceTyp.description: Sub-collection for custom service types for a specific user.
